title: Ahtna Announces Second Shareholder and Elder Dividend Distributions for 2021
summary: Anchorage, Alaska – The Board of Directors and the Trustees of Ahtna Hwt’aene (People’s) Trust have declared a 2021 shareholder dividend distribution of $20.65 per share. The dividend is in addition to the distribution of $13.00 per share that was made in April. The distribution will be made to all...

title: BSNC Promotes Miriam Aarons to Vice President of Corporate Communications
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the promotion of shareholder Miriam Aarons to Vice President of Corporate Communications.
